allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Add subtle animations and visual polish' --body ' *)

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe", "C:\\Users\\delaw\\AppData\\Local\\GitHubCLI\\gh.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\); $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ })
PowerShell($gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($gh\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $\($gh.Source\)" } else { Write-Host "NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($candidates = @\('gh','gh.exe','C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe','C:\\ProgramData\\chocolatey\\bin\\gh.exe',"$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\); $found = $candidates | ForEach-Object { try { $cmd = Get-Command $_ -ErrorAction Stop; $cmd.Source } catch { $null } } | Where-Object { $_ -and \(Test-Path $_\) } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($found\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $found"; & $found --version } else { Write-Host "NOT FOUND in any candidate path" })

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','Machine'\) + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Path','User'\); if \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Host "FOUND" } else { Write-Host "NOT FOUND" })
